title: [security] EDHOC duplicate build_context/build_signature functions and scoping bugs in responder
description: rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs:441-502 contains duplicate fn definitions for build_context_2/3 and build_signature_structure (one using encode_bstr, second append_cbor_bstr which appears undefined). Responder::process_message_1 has unbound vars c_i/g_x in if conditions and state assignment (lines ~1106-1118). This risks incorrect auth, key derivation or compile/runtime errors in key handling. Affects OSCORE context export. See commits 11d4a7a32, ed7ed668b. Priority 0.
